proof_signals.signal_text: Built an LLM-powered application using OpenAI / Anthropic / Bedrock APIs
proof_signals.context: Strong signal for AI Engineer roles. Even side projects count if they demonstrate real LLM integration beyond simple API calls.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built a RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) pipeline with vector search
proof_signals.context: One of the most expected AI engineering skills in 2025-2026 Israeli market. Should be standard in AI Engineer CVs.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built an AI agent or agentic workflow using LangChain / LangGraph / Claude SDK / OpenAI Agents
proof_signals.context: Increasingly expected skill. Agentic workflows are a major focus of Israeli AI startups.

proof_signals.signal_text: Deployed LLM-based systems to production serving real users
proof_signals.context: Separates candidates with real production AI experience from those with only experimental/POC work.

proof_signals.signal_text: Fine-tuned an LLM or other ML model for a specific task or domain
proof_signals.context: Important for applied AI and research-oriented roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Trained neural networks from scratch using PyTorch or TensorFlow
proof_signals.context: Standard expectation for applied AI researcher and senior AI engineer roles. Less critical for LLM-focused AI Engineer positions.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built computer vision systems for detection / segmentation / tracking
proof_signals.context: Critical for CV/Edge AI Engineer roles. Israeli market has high demand driven by defense, autonomous systems, and AR/VR.

proof_signals.signal_text: Deployed AI models on edge devices (Jetson, embedded systems, mobile)
proof_signals.context: Relatively rare skill combination — strong differentiator for CV/Edge AI roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Wrote CUDA kernels or optimized GPU code for ML workloads
proof_signals.context: Rare and highly valued skill. Strong signal for edge AI, research infrastructure, and performance-focused AI roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built end-to-end MLOps pipelines (training, deployment, monitoring)
proof_signals.context: Core signal for MLOps Engineer roles. Increasingly important for senior AI engineer roles too.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built monitoring and drift detection systems for production ML models
proof_signals.context: Key MLOps skill. Distinguishes production ML experience from research-only background.

proof_signals.signal_text: Ran distributed training on multi-GPU / multi-node clusters
proof_signals.context: Important for roles involving large-scale model training (research labs, large AI startups).

proof_signals.signal_text: Published research papers in AI/ML venues (conferences, journals)
proof_signals.context: Strong signal for applied AI researcher, head of AI, and research-oriented roles. Typical venues include NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, CVPR, ACL, EMNLP.

proof_signals.signal_text: MSc in Computer Science, AI, ML, Statistics, or related quantitative field
proof_signals.context: Common and often preferred for senior AI roles in Israeli market. Many Head of AI and Applied AI Researcher listings require MSc minimum.

proof_signals.signal_text: PhD in Computer Science, AI, ML, Statistics, or related quantitative field
proof_signals.context: Strong signal for applied AI researcher, head of AI, VP AI, and CV/Edge AI roles at research-heavy companies.

proof_signals.signal_text: BSc in STEM field (CS, Engineering, Math, Physics) with GPA 85+ or equivalent
proof_signals.context: Important for Junior AI/ML Engineer roles, especially for bootcamp/training program admission. Reichman University business students with strong quantitative records can qualify.

proof_signals.signal_text: Completed intensive AI/ML training program (Infinity Labs, MIT Bootcamp, Y-Data, etc.)
proof_signals.context: Common entry path to Junior AI Engineer roles in Israel. Particularly strong signal when combined with a substantive capstone project.

proof_signals.signal_text: Served in 8200 / Mamram / Talpiot or similar elite technical unit with AI/ML focus
proof_signals.context: Extremely valued in Israeli AI market, particularly for cybersecurity AI, CV/Edge AI, and AI leadership roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Led a team of AI/ML engineers, researchers, or data scientists
proof_signals.context: Essential for Head of AI, VP AI, and AI Solutions Engineering Manager roles. Team size and scope matter.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built and maintained prompt libraries or conversational AI templates
proof_signals.context: Strong signal for Prompt Engineer roles. Also relevant for AI Engineers focused on conversational products.

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed multi-turn conversational flows for chatbots or voice agents
proof_signals.context: Core signal for Prompt Engineer and conversational AI roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built evaluation frameworks or LLM-as-judge systems for AI models
proof_signals.context: Increasingly expected for senior AI engineer roles. Separates rigorous AI practitioners from prototype-only engineers.

proof_signals.signal_text: Solved hallucination or reliability problems in production LLM systems
proof_signals.context: Mentioned explicitly in multiple Israeli AI job listings. Demonstrates hands-on experience with real production challenges.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built AI-powered automation workflows using Zapier / Make / n8n + LLMs
proof_signals.context: Strong signal for AI Transformation Lead and AI Solutions Engineering roles. Also relevant for GTM Engineer (cross-sector).

proof_signals.signal_text: Led internal AI adoption or transformation program at a company
proof_signals.context: Core signal for AI Transformation Lead roles. Rare but increasingly demanded.

proof_signals.signal_text: Delivered AI-powered solutions to enterprise customers (consulting or solutions engineering)
proof_signals.context: Key signal for AI Solutions Engineering Manager roles and AI Transformation Leads at consulting firms.

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked with multiple LLM providers (OpenAI + Anthropic + open-source models)
proof_signals.context: Demonstrates breadth and sophistication in AI engineering. Increasingly common requirement.

proof_signals.signal_text: Optimized AI system costs and inference performance at scale
proof_signals.context: Increasingly important as AI production systems mature. Signal of senior-level AI engineering judgment.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built AI systems integrating multiple sensor types (RGB, thermal, radar, lidar)
proof_signals.context: Highly specialized signal for CV/Edge AI roles at defense, autonomous systems, or robotics companies.

proof_signals.signal_text: Production Python development experience (not just scripting)
proof_signals.context: Expected baseline for virtually all AI engineering roles. Distinguishes engineers from data scientists/researchers.

proof_signals.signal_text: Used LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, or similar AI frameworks
proof_signals.context: Highly expected in current Israeli AI Engineer market.

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, pgvector, FAISS)
proof_signals.context: Table stakes for mid+ AI Engineer roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Used MLflow, Weights & Biases, or DVC for experiment tracking
proof_signals.context: Important for MLOps and research-oriented roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Used Ray, Airflow, Prefect, or similar orchestration for ML pipelines
proof_signals.context: Advanced MLOps signal. Common in Israeli AI companies dealing with large-scale training or data workloads.

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked with cloud AI platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, Azure ML, Databricks)
proof_signals.context: Standard for MLOps roles, increasingly common for AI engineer roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built production NLP systems (classification, extraction, summarization, generation)
proof_signals.context: Strong signal for roles combining classical NLP and modern LLMs. Common at enterprise AI companies.

proof_signals.signal_text: Owned AI project from problem definition to production deployment and monitoring
proof_signals.context: One of the most important signals. Demonstrates maturity and completeness of AI engineering experience.

proof_signals.signal_text: Hired AI engineers or researchers (owned AI hiring pipeline)
proof_signals.context: Essential for Head of AI, VP AI, and AI Solutions Engineering Manager roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Defined AI strategy or roadmap for a product or company
proof_signals.context: Core signal for Head of AI, VP AI, and Chief AI Officer roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Communicated AI strategy and technical concepts to board, investors, or C-level executives
proof_signals.context: Important for VP AI / CAIO roles. Demonstrates executive maturity.

proof_signals.signal_text: Established AI governance, policies, or responsible AI frameworks at an organization
proof_signals.context: Key signal for AI Transformation Lead and Chief AI Officer roles, especially in regulated industries.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built or deployed AI systems in regulated industries (banking, healthcare, insurance, defense)
proof_signals.context: Valued signal — regulated industries require specific expertise in compliance-aware AI development.

proof_signals.signal_text: Experienced with PyTorch and/or TensorFlow for deep learning
proof_signals.context: Standard expectation for AI/ML engineer roles outside of pure LLM-integration work.

proof_signals.signal_text: Contributed to open-source AI/ML projects
proof_signals.context: Strong differentiator signal. Particularly valued by AI-focused startups.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built significant AI/ML side projects with public demonstration or portfolio
proof_signals.context: Critical for Junior AI roles given limited direct experience. Israeli AI market places heavy weight on demonstrable building ability.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built a functional product or feature using AI-assisted coding (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
proof_signals.context: Emerging signal that is increasingly valued. Demonstrates AI-native working style that multiple Israeli startups explicitly seek.

proof_signals.signal_text: Delivered AI projects as part of a consulting firm or agency
proof_signals.context: Common background for AI Transformation Lead and AI Solutions Engineering Manager roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Published technical AI content (blog posts, conference talks, open-source, research)
proof_signals.context: Signal of expertise and community engagement. More important for senior and leadership AI roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Background as Data Scientist with ML model development experience
proof_signals.context: Common transition path into AI Engineer roles. May need additional production engineering experience to be strong signal for senior AI engineer roles.

proof_signals.signal_text: Built production agent systems with LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, or Claude Agents SDK
proof_signals.context: Highly valued in current Israeli market where agentic AI is a major focus.

proof_signals.signal_text: Strong backend engineering background (Node.js, Python, Go) with production systems
proof_signals.context: Often required for senior AI engineer roles where AI is integrated into complex production systems.
